text:
Once upon an autumn night.

There stood an ancient oak tree with rings engraved like memories.

A boy lost.

He wandered lonely.

All alone.

No sound.

Just memories.

A faint wind sighs.

One last goodbye.

Oh... the oak...

They swayed.

And danced.

Under stars.


Forever just an acorn?

That's okay.

You wanted to grow up...

One day...

Just hear me... don...





*Thud* *

*Thunk* *

*Whisper...*

Who thinks?

You think...?

You think....



Nothing...

Just think...

You think...

Think...

You think....


What am I...?

An acorn?

How boring.

You want...

You crave...

You wish…

You desire…

An adventure...

You desire...

You wish...

Just like...

A knight…?

With shining...

You could sail…

Oh... the ocean…

So large...

With stars...

Like dreams.

Dreams...

So big.

So big…

You deserve...

You've earned
